hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:run || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CI failed — fix typecheck errors or failing tests before committing."}}'; fi
CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && git push 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git push'; then cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && sleep 4 && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) && RUN_ID=$(gh run list --branch "$BRANCH" --limit 1 --json databaseId -q '.[0].databaseId') && [ -n "$RUN_ID" ] && gh run watch "$RUN_ID" --exit-status --compact; fi
